hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then if npm run build > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","additionalContext":"✅ Build OK — push liberado."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"❌ Build falhou. Corrija os erros antes do push."}}'; fi; fi
